description.overview: An ancient Italian breed, the Spinone is one of the most gentle and patient pointing breeds. Their wiry coat and soulful expression are distinctive.
description.history: The Spinone Italiano originated in Italy.
description.temperament: Known for being docile, friendly, patient.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their wiry, dense, coarse coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient Italian breed, the Spinone is one of the most gentle and patient pointing breeds. Their wiry coat and soulful expression are distinctive.
